title: TechBlock - SpaceTech
description: A SpaceBlock 1.16.5 modpack that have hundreds of quests that will guide you through your playthrough. There are also hundreds of changed recipes and custom made machines.
body:
Embark on an interstellar adventure in this space-themed modpack, featuring hundreds of quests to guide you through the cosmos. With custom-made machines, altered recipes, and challenging resource management, every step demands ingenuity and strategy. Beware of the vacuum of space—managing your oxygen levels is as critical as conquering the stars! Don't forget to join our community!

**Website:**  techblock.pl

**Official server address:**  spacetech.techblock.pl
